methods.label: Methods
patterns: machine learning|deep learning|transformer|foundation model|protein language model|ESM|AlphaFold

sections.label: Selection & codon models
sections.query: ((("dN/dS" OR "codon model" OR HyPhy OR FEL OR MEME OR FUBAR OR BUSTED OR "branch-site") AND (selection OR evolution OR adaptive OR constraint)) OR (("episodic selection" OR "positive selection" OR "diversifying selection") AND (virus OR pathogen))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Cancer evolution & somatic selection
sections.query: ((("cancer evolution" OR "tumor evolution" OR "somatic evolution" OR "clonal evolution") AND (genomics OR sequencing OR phylogen* OR "single-cell")) OR ((cancer OR tumor OR lymphoma OR leukemia) AND ("positive selection" OR "clonal selection" OR "driver mutation" OR "dN/dS" OR "selection inference")) OR (("mutational signature" OR "mutational signatures") AND (cancer OR tumor) AND (evolution OR selection OR phylogeny))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Recombination & mosaicism
sections.query: (((recombination OR "mosaic genome" OR breakpoint OR "gene conversion") AND (virus OR virome OR pathogen)) OR ((RDP OR GARD OR "recombination detection") AND (sequence OR alignment))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Phylodynamics & transmission
sections.query: (((phylodynamic* OR "time-resolved phylogeny" OR BEAST OR "birth-death" OR coalescent) AND (virus OR pathogen)) OR (("genomic epidemiology" OR "phylodynamic inference") AND (outbreak OR transmission))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Urban / built environment virome
sections.query: (((virome OR "viral metagenomics" OR viromics) AND ("built environment" OR urban OR subway OR transit OR surface)) OR (("urban microbiome" OR MetaSUB) AND (virus OR virome OR phage))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Wastewater / WBE viral surveillance
sections.query: ((("wastewater surveillance" OR WBE OR sewage) AND (virus OR virome OR pathogen OR SARS-CoV-2)) OR ((wastewater OR sewage) AND ("viral metagenomics" OR viromics) AND (variant OR lineage OR evolution))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Pandemic preparedness & biosurveillance
sections.query: ((("pandemic preparedness" OR biosurveillance OR "pathogen surveillance") AND (genomics OR sequencing)) OR (("early warning" OR "sentinel surveillance") AND (metagenomics OR sequencing))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Atlases, compendia, reference resources
sections.query: (((atlas OR database OR compendium OR "reference catalog" OR resource) AND (virome OR microbiome OR pathogen)) OR (("large-scale" OR global) AND (virome OR microbiome) AND (metadata OR harmonization))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

items.title: Adaptive graph learning of microbial phylogeny enables accurate and interpretable microbiome-based host phenotype prediction.
items.authors: Biao Dong, Bin Wang, Jiongjin Chen, Xiaomin Xu, Zhenjiang Zech Xu
items.abstract_snippet: The human microbiome is inherently structured by phylogeny, yet most predictive models treat microbial taxa as independent features, thereby underusing evolutionary information that may improve disease classification. While recent deep learning approaches have…

sections.label: Metagenomics benchmarking & pipelines
sections.query: ((metagenomics AND (benchmark* OR pipeline OR "best practices" OR reproducible OR workflow)) OR ((Kraken2 OR MetaPhlAn OR Bracken OR Centrifuge OR Kaiju) AND (benchmark* OR evaluation))) AND (benchmark* OR workflow OR pipeline OR Snakemake OR Nextflow OR WDL) NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

items.title: A highly sensitive amplicon sequencing workflow for genomic surveillance of Usutu virus.
items.authors: Gábor Endre Tóth, Anna Nagy, Jaime A Costales, M Alejandra Camacho, Santiago F Burneo, Marike Petersen
items.abstract_snippet: Genomic surveillance of Usutu virus (USUV) in blood donors is hampered by extremely low viral loads, which usually prevent reliable genome sequencing. We developed and validated a tiled amplicon-based sequencing protocol optimized for low-titer samples. Serial…

items.title: nf-core/magmap: Map metatranscriptomes to large collections of genomes.
items.authors: Danilo Di Leo, Emelie Nilsson, George Westmeijer, Jarone Pinhassi, Daniel Lundin
items.abstract_snippet: The lack of publicly available reference genomes has forced annotation of metatranscriptomes to either use direct alignment of sequence reads to reference databases or de novo assembly. As more and more natural environments are covered by metagenomic surveys, …

sections.label: ML for evolution & pathogens
sections.query: ((("machine learning" OR "deep learning" OR transformer) AND (virus OR pathogen OR evolution OR phylogeny)) OR (("protein language model" OR ESM) AND (mutation OR evolution OR fitness))) AND ("machine learning" OR "deep learning" OR transformer OR "foundation model" OR "protein language model" OR ESM) NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

items.title: A machine learning-driven multitask framework for antibiotic resistance prediction in Escherichia coli, Klebsiella pneumoniae, and Enterobacter cloacae bloodstream infections among hematological malignancy patients.
items.authors: Yuqing Cui, Xiaomeng Feng, Ruonan Shao, Lining Zhang, Xueyuan Li, Qingsong Lin
items.abstract_snippet: Inappropriate empirical antimicrobial therapy (IEAT) significantly increases mortality in patients with resistant Gram-negative bacteremia. We developed a multitask machine learning framework to predict carbapenem resistance (CR), β-lactam/β-lactamase inhibito…

items.title: Identification of FOXK1 and SEMA7A as key genes associated with m6A-related programmed cell death in diabetic retinopathy.
items.authors: Jie Yang, Zhenyu Wu, Ningning Dong
items.abstract_snippet: Diabetic retinopathy (DR), a serious microvascular complication of diabetes, has a complex pathogenic mechanism that is intricately linked to programmed cell death (PCD) and also to N6-methyladenosine (m6A) modification. The objective of this research was to p…

items.title: Efficient in vivo cytosine base editing using virus-like particles with uracil DNA glycosylase inhibition.
items.authors: Junjie Zhu, Lin Ding, Kai-Ming Liu, Xingyu Zhu, Jifang Li, Buer Ha
items.abstract_snippet: Virus-like particles (VLPs) are promising for delivering genome editors, yet the in vivo in vivo efficacy of VLP-mediated cytosine base editing remains limited. Here we identified insufficient inhibition of uracil DNA glycosylases as the underlying mechanism o…

items.title: CT-based Deep Learning Model for Automatic Segmentation and Early Predicting of Pyogenic Liver Abscess Caused by Extended-Spectrum β-lactamase-Producing Enterobacteriaceae: A Multicenter Retrospective Study (CLASS2401).
items.authors: Zibo Gong, Hairui Wang, Yawen Guo, Tao Pan, Daxin Zhou, Peng Yao
items.abstract_snippet: Pyogenic liver abscess (PLA) caused by extended-spectrum β-lactamase-producing Enterobacteriaceae (ESBL-PLA) presents major antimicrobial treatment challenges and delayed pathogen identification. This study developed and validated deep learning-based models in…

items.title: Formulation and stability design spaces for a new yellow fever vaccine.
items.authors: Didier Clénet, Noémie Mansois, Yawen Guo, Bruna Araujo Dos Ramos, Landry Bertaux, Manuel Vangelisti
items.journal: European journal of pharmaceutics and biopharmaceutics : official journal of Arbeitsgemeinschaft fur Pharmazeutische Verfahrenstechnik e.V
items.abstract_snippet: Yellow fever (YF) is a life-threatening disease that is entirely preventable through vaccination. The objective of this study was to formulate a freeze-dried presentation of a live-attenuated, Vero cell-based yellow fever vaccine (vYF) with improved manufactur…

items.title: Artificial intelligence and automation in enzyme engineering: evolution, advances, and future perspectives.
items.authors: Kexin Hao, Jianguang Liu, Hui Tang, Yan Zhang, Yandong Sun, Hongyu Zhang
items.abstract_snippet: Natural enzymes often fail to meet industrial demands for catalytic efficiency, stability, and substrate specificity, creating a critical bottleneck in biomanufacturing. This review examines how artificial intelligence (AI) and automation are reshaping enzyme …

items.title: Application of plant viruses in biotechnology with relation to artificial intelligence, machine learning, and nanotechnology.
items.authors: Khushboo Jain, Anchal Saini, Avinash Marwal, Sunny Dhir, S M Paul Khurana
items.abstract_snippet: Plant viruses, once viewed as harmful agricultural pathogens, are now powerful tools in biotechnology. Their nanoscale structure, self-assembly, and biocompatibility enable applications in agriculture, medicine, and environmental sustainability. They serve in …
